inputs.reasoning: Named captures exercise the Latin1 flag in Regexp::ParseState::ParseState, which affects the rune_max_ variable, and also trigger the kLeftParen case in Regexp::ParseState::FinishRegexp, which deletes the name_ field of a Regexp.

A non-capturing group with a repetition exercise the kRegexpCharClass case in Regexp::ParseState::PushRegexp, which can trigger the special case for a character class of one character, and also exercise the IsMarker function.

A character class with a large number of characters exercise the kRegexpCharClass case in Regexp::ParseState::PushRegexp, which can trigger the special case for a character class of one character, and also exercise the IsMarker function.
Two named captures exercise the kLeftParen case in Regexp::ParseState::FinishRegexp, which deletes the name_ field of a Regexp, and also trigger the special case for a CharClassBuilder.

A large repetition exercise the kRegexpCharClass case in Regexp::ParseState::PushRegexp, which can trigger the special case for a character class of one character, and also exercise the IsMarker function.

A non-capturing group with a repetition exercise the kRegexpCharClass case in Regexp::ParseState::PushRegexp, which can trigger the special case for a character class of one character, and also exercise the IsMarker function.

A named capture followed by a non-capturing group with a repetition exercise the kLeftParen case in Regexp::ParseState::FinishRegexp, which deletes the name_ field of a Regexp, and also trigger the special case for a CharClassBuilder.

A large counted repetition exercise the kRegexpCharClass case in Regexp::ParseState::PushRegexp, which can trigger the special case for a character class of one character, and also exercise the IsMarker function.

A non-capturing group with a large repetition exercise the kRegexpCharClass case in Regexp::ParseState::PushRegexp, which can trigger the special case for a character class of one character, and also exercise the IsMarker function.

A named capture followed by a large repetition exercise the kLeftParen case in Regexp::ParseState::FinishRegexp, which deletes the name_ field of a Regexp, and also trigger the special case for a CharClassBuilder.
